title: The Candy Addiction Takes Hold
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the candy addiction takes hold.
scene: The scene focuses on the candy addiction takes hold, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's a pretty unstable body you've got!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is there some kind of problem...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Then do you intend to...go after him?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I swear, when I find him ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ZORO!! You go along with them.

summary: The Candy Addiction Takes Hold. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
